context_notes: Phase 3 plan-phase workflow paused mid-run at 83% context. All upstream artifacts (RESEARCH.md, VALIDATION.md, PATTERNS.md, PLAN.md x3) are written and committed. The remaining steps are: (1) plan-checker verification, (2) any revision iterations, (3) requirements-coverage gate, (4) auto-advance to execute-phase (the --auto flag triggered the chain). On resume, --auto should continue the chain. Key architectural invariants to preserve: D-04 observer pattern extends the already-Validated MarketDataSource ABC, D-02 service stays FastAPI-agnostic so Phase 5 chat can reuse, D-12 validate-then-write with single commit per trade. Planner's self-reported Source Audit passed (all 5 PORT IDs covered, all 16 CONTEXT decisions mapped to tasks, all 10 RESEARCH pitfalls referenced).
